sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Replimune plans third attempt at RP1 approval in coming days
feed.summary: Replimune is making a third attempt to gain FDA approval for its melanoma treatment, RP1, following rejections in June 2025 and April 2026. The company has filed a resubmission, which the FDA will reportedly treat as urgent. This comes after recent layoffs at the company.

feed.title: QXO launches tender offers for TopBuild senior notes By Investing.com
feed.summary: QXO Inc. has initiated tender offers to acquire all outstanding senior notes of TopBuild Corp. as part of its pending acquisition of the company. The offers target $500 million of 4.125% Senior Notes due 2032 and $750 million of 5.625% Senior Notes due 2034, seeking to amend indentures to remove restrictive covenants and change of control offer requirements. The tender and consent solicitations are conditional upon the completion of the TopBuild acquisition.

feed.title: A Look at Q2 Holdings Inc (QTWO) After 4.9% Gain -- GF Value $70
feed.summary: Q2 Holdings Inc (QTWO) shares recently gained 4.9%, but the stock is considered significantly undervalued, trading at $47.35 against a GF Value™ estimate of $70.51. Despite this undervaluation, the company has a low profitability rating and has seen substantial insider selling without any buying activity, raising concerns for potential investors even with a solid financial strength score.

feed.title: Qualys and Tenable Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Qualys (QLYS) and Tenable (TENB) stocks both jumped significantly after Snowflake's strong Q1 results and Dell's blowout earnings report. These events weakened the "SaaSpocalypse" narrative, suggesting that AI accelerates demand for enterprise data platforms and hardware rather than cannibalizing software. The article highlights that enterprises are deploying AI at scale, needing both software and hardware, and a supportive macro backdrop further boosted the market.

feed.title: [10-K] PARK AEROSPACE CORP Files Annual Report
feed.summary: Park Aerospace Corp. (PKE) has filed its annual report, detailing strong financial performance in fiscal year 2026. The company reported an 18% increase in net sales to $73.3 million and a 92% rise in net earnings to $11.3 million due to higher demand in military, commercial aircraft, and space markets, improved gross margins, and increased interest income. Park also actively managed its liquidity by raising $21.7 million through an at-the-market equity program and maintaining strong cash reserves, while planning for a new composite materials manufacturing facility to meet future demand.

feed.title: Book value per share of Sprott Physical Silver Trust – HAM:S2S
feed.summary: This article provides the book value per share for the Sprott Physical Silver Trust (HAM:S2S). It is listed under the Hamburg Stock Exchange within the Investment Trusts/Mutual Funds category. The page offers financial data for the trust, indicating a closed market with no recent trades.

feed.title: Coterra Energy (CTRA) Laps the Stock Market: Here's Why
feed.summary: Coterra Energy (CTRA) recently outperformed the S&P 500 with a 1.29% gain, following a 18.5% increase in the past month. The company is set to release earnings on February 26, 2026, with projected EPS of $0.45 and revenue of $1.88 billion. Despite positive long-term projections, Coterra Energy currently holds a Zacks Rank of #5 (Strong Sell) due to recent downward revisions in analyst estimates.

feed.title: Sprott Physical Silver Trust Financial Statements – HAM:S2S
feed.summary: This page provides financial statements and key information for Sprott Physical Silver Trust (HAM:S2S). It details the company's profile as a closed-end investment trust focused on physical silver bullion, outlining its investment strategy and corporate structure. The article also touches upon valuation metrics and dividend policy, noting that S2S has never paid dividends.

feed.title: There May Be Reason For Hope In Colgate-Palmolive (India)'s (NSE:COLPAL) Disappointing Earnings
feed.summary: Despite seemingly disappointing earnings, Colgate-Palmolive (India)'s recent financial report suggests a stronger underlying performance than initially perceived. The company's accrual ratio of -0.73 indicates excellent cash conversion, with free cash flow significantly exceeding reported profit. This strong cash generation, coupled with a 27% annual EPS growth over the last three years, suggests that the statutory profit may actually understate the company's true earnings potential.

feed.title: Palmer Square Capital BDC (PSBD): Manager Martin Bicknell holds 10.09% via affiliates
feed.summary: Palmer Square Capital BDC Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, revealing that Martin Christopher Bicknell beneficially owns 10.09% of the company's shares through affiliated entities. These entities include 1248 Holdings, BFFV19, and MCHC, with Mr. Bicknell holding shared voting and dispositive power over a total of 3,139,713 shares. The filing specifies that 31,120,814 shares were outstanding as of May 5, 2026, used for calculating ownership percentages.

feed.title: OCS: OCS-01 failed phase III endpoints in DME; focus shifts to Privosegtor and licaminlimab
feed.summary: Oculis Holding AG (OCS) announced that its OCS-01 failed to meet primary and key secondary endpoints in Phase III trials for Diabetic Macular Edema (DME). While OCS-01 showed significant retinal thickness reduction and a favorable safety profile, an FDA filing will not be pursued. The company will now shift its resources to its late-stage assets, Privosegtor and licaminlimab.

feed.title: After tax other income/expense of Off The Hook YS Inc. – AMEX:NXB
feed.summary: The article provides financial information for Off The Hook YS Inc. (NXB) on TradingView, specifically focusing on its after-tax other income/expense. It indicates that the market is currently closed and presents data provided by ICE Data Services and FactSet.

feed.title: Primoris (PRIM) legal chief sells 29,707 shares, keeps large trust stake
feed.summary: John M. Perisich, the chief legal and administrative officer of Primoris Services Corp (PRIM), sold 29,707 shares of company stock on May 28, 2026, as part of an annual asset diversification strategy. The sales occurred in multiple transactions with prices ranging from $125.06 to $130.24 per share. Despite these sales, Perisich retains a substantial stake in the company, holding 27,574 shares directly and 133,607 shares indirectly through the Perisich Family Trust.

feed.title: Truist Lowers Xcel Energy (XEL) Price Target, Sees Utilities Benefiting From Data Center Growth
feed.summary: Truist has lowered its price target for Xcel Energy (XEL) to $92 from $95 but maintained a Buy rating, citing the utility sector's benefit from the ongoing data center expansion wave. Xcel Energy's strong capital execution and increasing demand from large-load customers, including a new 15-year data center agreement with Google, positions them well to meet growing power demands. The company is actively investing in new infrastructure and collaborating with NextEra Energy to accelerate energy supply and development for new data center capacity.

feed.title: Barclays Lowers RadNet (RDNT) Price Target, Says Imaging Business Continues to Outperform
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Andrew Mok lowered RadNet's (RDNT) price target to $65 from $70, while reiterating an Overweight rating. The analyst highlighted RadNet's continued outperformance in advanced volume growth and pricing within its imaging business. RadNet also recently announced a joint venture with Saint Alphonsus Health System, acquiring a majority stake in Intermountain Medical Imaging, LLC.

feed.title: Progyny (PGNY) director Kevin Gordon sells 5,500 shares and shifts holdings to trust
feed.summary: Progyny director Kevin K. Gordon sold 5,500 shares of common stock at $24.99 per share, reducing his direct holdings to 9,318 shares. Concurrently, 2,526 shares were transferred from his direct ownership into the Kevin Gordon Revocable Declaration of Trust, which now holds 15,027 shares with Gordon as trustee. This activity, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, represents a net-sell position of 5,500 shares and a restructuring of his personal and trust assets.

feed.title: Director at OP Bancorp (NASDAQ: OPBK) exercises 3,371 RSUs, gets 2,987 award
feed.summary: OP Bancorp director Min Kim engaged in equity compensation activities on May 28, 2026. Kim exercised 3,371 previously granted restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock and received a new grant of 2,987 RSUs. Following these transactions, Kim directly holds 614,796 shares of OP Bancorp common stock, with no open-market purchases or sales reported.

feed.title: Oil-Dri Corp of America stock (US6779001037): No verified same-day catalyst on Friday
feed.summary: On Friday, May 29, 2026, Oil-Dri Corp of America (ODC) traded in the U.S. market without any identified same-day company news or analyst updates that would act as a market catalyst. The stock's valuation and sentiment remain anchored to its U.S. listing context, with the most recent dated price point of $59.22 from July 2025 being too old for current valuation signals. Investors are awaiting future company updates or earnings-related filings for new market insights.

feed.title: Outset Medical's Marc Nash to Depart as Executive Vice President, R&D, Operations and Service
feed.summary: Outset Medical announced that Marc Nash will depart from his role as Executive Vice President, R&D, Operations and Service, effective June 5, 2026. Nash is leaving to pursue other professional opportunities, and his departure is not due to any dispute with the company. The company has not yet disclosed information about his replacement.

feed.title: Navitas (NVTS) director-affiliated entities sell shares, receive 1.15M earnout stock
feed.summary: Entities linked to Navitas Semiconductor director Richard J. Hendrix sold 143,814 shares of Class A Common Stock in late May 2026 at weighted average prices between $28-$30 per share. Separately, the company transferred 1,147,225 shares to Live Oak Sponsor Partners II, LLC (an entity Hendrix is a managing member of) on May 18, 2026, as part of a settlement agreement for prior earnout share obligations. Despite the sales, Hendrix retains substantial indirect holdings in Navitas Semiconductor.

feed.title: Nutrien (NTR) sets terms for US$1B 2031 and 2036 senior notes under updated indenture
feed.summary: Nutrien Ltd. (NTR) has formalized the terms for US$1 billion in new senior notes, comprising US$500 million due in 2031 with a 4.850% interest rate and US$500 million due in 2036 with a 5.350% interest rate, under an updated indenture. This Second Supplemental Indenture establishes the roles of The Bank of New York Mellon as U.S. Trustee and Computershare Advantage Trust of Canada as Canadian Trustee, defining their respective responsibilities, particularly regarding compliance with Canadian trust indenture legislation for Canadian noteholders. The agreement integrates these new notes into Nutrien's existing debt framework from 2018, as amended in 2024.

feed.title: Sprott Physical Silver Trust Cash Flow – HAM:S2S
feed.summary: This article provides details on the cash flow of Sprott Physical Silver Trust (HAM:S2S). It highlights that the free cash flow for Q1 2026 was -193.88M EUR, contrasting with 123.64M EUR for the full year 2025, which was also the operating cash flow for that year. The article presents a financial overview including operating, investing, and financing activities, with historical cash flow data from 2010 to 2025.

feed.title: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz sells $1.48 million in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings CEO George Kurtz sold approximately $1.48 million worth of Class A common stock across transactions on May 28 and May 29, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. The sales occurred with the stock trading near its 52-week high, and following these transactions, Kurtz directly holds over 2.1 million shares. The article also touches upon recent analyst updates and strategic developments for CrowdStrike, including increased price targets from Jefferies and Benchmark, and expansion of Project QuiltWorks.

feed.title: Navitas (NVTS) director Ranbir Singh sells 3.7M shares but keeps large stake
feed.summary: Navitas Semiconductor Corp director Ranbir Singh sold a total of 3.72 million Class A Common Stock shares across May 27-28, 2026, for approximately $108.70 million. Despite the significant sales, Singh retains a substantial stake of nearly 15 million shares in the company, signaling continued investment. The transactions were open-market sales at weighted average prices of $29.29 and $28.72 per share, and the details were disclosed in a Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Olaplex (NASDAQ: OLPX) sets July 27 hearing on derivative settlement
feed.summary: Olaplex Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OLPX) is nearing final approval for a settlement in stockholder derivative litigation. The proposed settlement includes corporate governance reforms and allocates $700,000 for attorneys' fees and expenses, to be paid by the defendants' insurers. A final settlement hearing is scheduled for July 27, 2026, where shareholders can object to the terms if desired.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Trims CMS Energy (CMS) Target While Keeping Equal Weight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) from $81 to $77, while maintaining an Equal Weight rating, noting utilities' underperformance against the S&P 500 in April. Truist also reduced its target for CMS to $83 from $86, keeping a Buy rating, due to the ongoing data center expansion presenting benefits for vertically integrated electric utilities like CMS. CMS Energy, operating in Michigan with Electric Utility, Gas Utility, and NorthStar Clean Energy segments, is seen as a beneficiary of increased power demand from data centers.

feed.title: Barclays Says Honeywell (HON) Has Clear Catalysts as Spinoffs Near
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Honeywell International Inc. (HON) to $251 from $243, reiterating an Overweight rating due to clear catalysts including upcoming capital markets days and two planned spinoffs. The firm anticipates a 10%-15% upside potential for the stock. Honeywell's CEO reported a strong start to 2026 with a 7% increase in organic orders and a backlog exceeding $38 billion, despite geopolitical challenges and supply chain constraints.

feed.title: Texas Instruments director Martin S. Craighead sells $3.2 million in stock
feed.summary: Martin S. Craighead, a director at Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ:TXN), sold 10,000 shares of common stock worth approximately $3.2 million on May 28, 2026. This sale follows a 72% surge in TXN shares over the past year, with the stock currently trading above its InvestingPro Fair Value, indicating potential overvaluation. Despite the sale, Craighead still directly holds 14,359 shares, while the company has been the subject of several analyst upgrades and strategic discussions highlighting its role in the AI data center market.

feed.title: Equinix Geo Zones Targets Data Sovereignty As Stock Trades Below Targets
feed.summary: Equinix has launched Equinix Fabric Geo Zones, a new solution designed to help customers comply with data sovereignty regulations like GDPR and LGPD by enforcing geographic boundaries at the network level. This product introduction comes as Equinix's stock (NasdaqGS:EQIX) is trading around $1,068.04, below analyst targets, despite strong long-term returns. Investors are advised to monitor the adoption rate of Geo Zones by enterprises and cloud providers, as this will be a key factor in how this development impacts Equinix's future performance.

feed.title: Power Integrations (NASDAQ:POWI) Director Sells $10,743,368.28 in Stock
feed.summary: Balu Balakrishnan, a director at Power Integrations (NASDAQ:POWI), sold 124,287 shares of the company's stock for over $10.74 million on May 28th, reducing his ownership by 30.78%. This sale follows other significant insider transactions earlier in the week. Despite the insider selling and a recent stock dip, Power Integrations recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Is Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Now Attractive After A 41% One Year Share Price Fall?
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) has seen a 41.5% decline in its share price over the past year, sparking investor interest in its current valuation. An Excess Returns model suggests the stock is undervalued by 37.6% based on an intrinsic value of $322.15 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 32.06x is significantly higher than the industry and peer averages, indicating it might be overvalued by a different metric.

feed.title: National Health Investors (NHI) stockholders elect full board and ratify BDO
feed.summary: National Health Investors (NHI) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 27, 2026, where shareholders elected all seven director nominees, approved executive compensation on an advisory basis, and ratified BDO USA, P.C. as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. A quorum of 87.46% of eligible shares was present, and all proposals passed with significant majorities.

feed.title: [Form 4] NEUROCRINE BIOSCIENCES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences director Johanna Mercier reported the acquisition of 2,567 restricted stock units (RSUs) through a Form 4 filing. These RSUs represent the right to receive one share of Neurocrine Biosciences common stock each and will vest in full on May 27, 2027. This transaction increases her direct holdings to 2,567 RSUs.

feed.title: Neurocrine (NASDAQ: NBIX) CSO exercises options, sells 11,000 pre-planned shares
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences' Chief Scientific Officer, Jude Onyia, exercised stock options for 11,000 shares at $84.74 per share and subsequently sold the same number of shares on the open market at a weighted average price of $155.5332. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on February 25, 2026. Following these transactions, Onyia directly holds 25,846 common shares and 24,268 non-qualified stock options.

feed.title: Nexa Resources SA Gradually Resuming Production At Cajamarquilla
feed.summary: Nexa Resources SA is gradually resuming production at its Cajamarquilla facility. The article is a brief news update from Reuters, indicating the restart of operations after a period of disruption.

feed.title: OneSpan Inc (OSPN) Shares Surge 4.0% -- What GF Score of 66 Tells Investors
feed.summary: OneSpan Inc (OSPN) shares recently surged 4.0%, bringing its GF Score to 66/100. Despite this positive momentum and a strong Financial Strength rating of 9/10, the stock is considered approximately 4.9% overvalued based on its GF Value™ estimate. Insiders have also been selling shares, which could be a cautionary signal for potential investors given the low growth prospects.

feed.title: NMTC - NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation stock news, filings & ratings
feed.summary: NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (NMTC) operates as a medical technology company specializing in thin-film electrode technology for various neurological disorders. The company's stock is currently trading at $3.55, down 4.70%, and it has recently seen several SEC filings, including form SD and 8-K. Analyst ratings are mixed with recent updates ranging from Buy to Hold, and the article also details various insider transactions and corporate events like a recent 1-for-6 reverse stock split.

feed.title: NeoVolta Raises $25 Million in Underwritten Stock Offering, Nets $23.5 Million for Growth
feed.summary: NeoVolta successfully completed an underwritten public offering, raising $25 million by issuing 12,195,122 shares of common stock at $2.05 each. The company netted approximately $23.5 million after fees, and plans to utilize these funds to meet joint venture obligations and for general working capital purposes. The agreement also includes a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase an additional 1,829,268 shares.

feed.title: Should nCino’s (NCNO) AI-Driven Q1 Beat and Higher Guidance Require Action From Investors?
feed.summary: nCino (NCNO) reported a strong Q1 fiscal 2027 with increased revenue and net income, alongside higher guidance for Q2 and the full fiscal year. The company attributes this success to the growing adoption of its AI-enabled platform and new pricing model. This positive performance reinforces the investment narrative but also highlights potential risks related to competition and customer price sensitivity in adopting new pricing structures.

feed.title: Paysign (PAYS) CLO granted 66,667 performance shares; 39,235 withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Paysign's Chief Legal Officer, Robert Strobo, was granted 66,667 performance-based restricted shares on May 27, 2026, which vested upon the achievement of specific earnings targets. Concurrently, 39,235 shares were withheld by the company to cover tax obligations related to this vesting. Following these transactions, Strobo directly holds 393,957 shares of Paysign common stock, with the disposition being a tax-withholding mechanism rather than an open-market sale.

feed.title: Paysign (PAYS) EVP Joan Herman sells 22,534 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Paysign, Inc.'s EVP of Operations and director, Joan M. Herman, sold 22,534 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $7.0133 per share on May 26, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on September 12, 2025. Following the sale, Herman still holds 813,989 shares of Paysign common stock, indicating the sale represents a small portion of her overall holdings.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) director sells 10,000 shares of stock
feed.summary: Texas Instruments director Martin S. Craighead sold 10,000 shares of Common Stock in two open-market transactions on May 28, 2026. The sales were executed at weighted average prices of $321.0069 and $320.4075 per share, totaling approximately $3.2 million. Following these transactions, Craighead retains 14,716 shares, and the filing indicated a negative sentiment due to the sale.

feed.title: NVE Corp (NVEC) Stock Down 3.4% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 69/100
feed.summary: NVE Corp (NVEC) saw its stock fall by 3.4% to $97.63, yet it remains significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus's metrics. The GF Value™ indicates an intrinsic value of $66.51, representing a 46.8% overvaluation, and its P/E ratio of 31.1x is well above its 5-year median. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 69/100 and solid financial health, concerns persist regarding its low growth and valuation ranks, coupled with an absence of insider transactions over the last three months.

feed.title: Xylem Inc. (XYL) Announces $1 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. has successfully completed a public offering of $1 billion in senior notes, comprising $500 million of 5.200% Senior Notes due 2033 and $500 million of 5.450% Senior Blue Notes due 2036. The proceeds from the 2033 notes will repay existing debt and support general corporate purposes, while the 2036 Blue Notes are designated for sustainable "blue projects." This strategic move aims to efficiently manage debt and advance the company's growth and sustainability goals.

feed.title: Personalis CFO and COO Aaron Tachibana sells $449,292 in stock
feed.summary: Personalis, Inc.'s CFO and COO, Aaron Tachibana, recently sold 38,799 shares of company stock for $449,292 after exercising stock options. The sale occurred near the stock's 52-week high, following significant gains over the past year. Concurrently, Personalis reported strong Q1 results, with its NeXT Personal MRD test showing substantial growth and expanded Medicare coverage.

feed.title: Personalis (PSNL) Is Up 34.5% After CMS Expands NeXT Personal MRD Test Medicare Coverage
feed.summary: Personalis saw its stock rise 34.5% after CMS expanded Medicare coverage for its NeXT Personal minimal residual disease test to include monitoring neoadjuvant therapy response in Stage II–III triple-negative and HER2-positive breast cancer patients. This expansion, along with a recent decision to cover immunotherapy response monitoring, strengthens the company's near-term reimbursement catalysts. Despite these wins, Personalis still faces significant cash burn, operating losses, and potential future dilution, which investors should consider.

feed.title: Personalis (NASDAQ: PSNL) CEO sells 100K shares after exercising options
feed.summary: Personalis, Inc. CEO Christopher M. Hall exercised stock options for 100,000 shares at $1.61 per share and simultaneously sold all 100,000 shares in open-market transactions at a weighted average price of approximately $11.02 per share. These transactions, which occurred on May 28-29, 2026, were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 17, 2025. Following these sales, Hall directly holds 235,986 shares of Common Stock and still has stock options for 300,000 shares.

feed.title: Personalis (PSNL) CFO sells shares via pre-set Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Personalis, Inc.'s CFO and COO, Aaron Tachibana, executed a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, exercising stock options to acquire 38,799 shares at $9.16 per share and subsequently selling them at a weighted average price of $11.58. Following these transactions on May 29, 2026, Tachibana directly holds 198,833 common shares and 68,832 fully vested stock options. This insider activity, valued at approximately $449,292 from the sale, was conducted according to a plan adopted on August 7, 2025.

feed.title: Smallcap Software Names Power Fresh Growth Stories
feed.summary: Smallcap software companies are driving growth in the technology sector through solutions in work management, cybersecurity, and supply-chain platforms. Their recurring revenue models offer resilience amidst fluctuating digital demand. The article highlights the importance of these focused software names and their contribution to market leadership trends, particularly within the NASDAQ Composite.

feed.title: What Does Breakthrough Therapy Designation Mean for Relay Therapeutics
feed.summary: Relay Therapeutics' lead oncology candidate, zovegalisib, has received FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation for specific PIK3CA-mutant advanced breast cancer, indicating accelerated development and regulatory support. This designation is supported by promising Phase 1/2 ReDiscover trial data showing strong efficacy and a favorable safety profile compared to existing treatments. A critical upcoming catalyst for investors is the presentation of Phase 1/2 data for the Phase 3 dose in March 2026, which could significantly impact the stock's trajectory.
